title: Blog pages + TipTap admin editor
description: Blog public pages (SSR/SEO) + admin TipTap editor. Client-side DOMPurify on v-html. Editor sends content_json, backend generates HTML.

pages./blog: SSR, cursor pagination, filter by category+tag, BreadcrumbList, RSS link in <head>
pages./blog/[slug]: SSR, Schema.org BlogPosting(datePublished/Modified/author/image), reading_time_minutes display, comment form, canonical=/blog/{slug}
pages./admin/blog: List with status filter (draft/published/archived), create/edit/delete/preview buttons
pages./admin/blog/[id]/edit: TipTap editor, SEO panel(meta_title max60/meta_description max160 with char counter), image upload -> POST /api/v1/media/upload -> TipTap insertContent, status toggle draft/published

components: PostCard.vue — title, excerpt, date, reading_time, category
contracts: v-html only with content_html from API (already bleach-cleaned on backend)
Editor saves content_json (not HTML) — backend generates HTML
acceptance_criteria: Comment form submits and shows success state
TipTap loads existing content_json on edit
SeoPanel counts meta_title chars in real time
